subject: Add contains condition support to cps-path
commit_message:

Patch Set 4:

Because we are writing new tests in integration-test module, coverage is dropping on cps-ri. You will need to change cps-ri/pom.xml to lower the coverage threshold - add this to the cps-ri/pom.xml:
    <properties>
        <minimum-coverage>0.96</minimum-coverage>
    </properties>
